item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 11min In retrospect if Gabriel falls to the ground here the goal probably doesn’t stand. Same
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 11min In retrospect if Gabriel falls to the ground here the goal probably doesn’t stand. Same with Haaland and the headbutt. It’s for the better of the game and to the credit of both players that they just got on with it. Proper battle that Haaland edged in the end. Cita Mac @Mac_Gooner · 2h A foul everyone ignored 1 2 885

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 11min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf I am now going to search golf terms for a bit and try to r
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 11min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf I am now going to search golf terms for a bit and try to reset the algo. 312

item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 12min Watch this closely.
Fitz drops the winning putt and immediately looks at… the crow
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 12min Watch this closely.
Fitz drops the winning putt and immediately looks at… the crowd.
Same crowd that cheered and chanted when he missed on the 72nd hole.
Said afterwards it was like winning a football match at your rival’s home ground.
Love it. De Skratch 13 469

item.title: CDEccleshare: Ben Coley reposteó Charlie Eccleshare @CDEccleshare · 31min As with much of the season, think the psychology/approach Ar
item.description: Ben Coley reposteó Charlie Eccleshare @CDEccleshare · 31min As with much of the season, think the psychology/approach Arsenal argument obscures a simpler truth. Have better technical players available and guess what you can play better football! There's a delta between Martinelli and Gyokeres (from Bournemouth game) and Odegaard and Eze. 3 12 30 4 mil

item.title: DPWorldTour: DP World Tour @DPWorldTour · 26min Matt Fitzpatrick the cross-handed chipping expert 6 3 mil
item.description: DP World Tour @DPWorldTour · 26min Matt Fitzpatrick the cross-handed chipping expert 6 3 mil
